name: aixbdd-bridge
description: Bridge extension for Waterball AIxBDD (AI-Driven Behavior-Driven Development)
author: CK's Pi Harness

skills.name: aibdd-kickoff
skills.description: Initialize AIxBDD context and tech stack.

skills.name: aibdd-discovery
skills.description: Discover facts, activities, and rules from requirements.

skills.name: aibdd-plan
skills.description: Transform discovery facts into technical implementation plans.

skills.name: aibdd-tasks
skills.description: Generate task graph and sequence for implementation.

skills.name: aibdd-reconcile
skills.description: Handle requirement changes by cascading reconciliation through artifacts.

skills.name: clarify-loop
skills.description: Continuously clarify ambiguous requirements before planning.
